channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: When RAG pipelines hit 500ms in prod
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 87% by moving from Chroma to PostgreSQL + pgvector — concurrency, cache stampedes, and the ivfflat tuning mistake most teams miss. 95% of requests now under 500ms.

item.title: Prove you ship, not just code
item.description: Portfolio that lands remote jobs: show production evidence, not screenshots. Learn how Nairobi engineers reduced failed payments 94% and cut AWS bills 40% with real code and metrics.

item.title: Pay me $95k: salary negotiation for Tunisia, Colombia
item.description: Land USD 95k–105k contracts from US/EU clients — spreadsheet kit, Wise 5.27.0 FX math, and email templates that actually work

item.title: AI salary boosters: 2 models that pay off in 2026
item.description: 2026 salary data shows RAG engineers earn 28% more, but observability engineers close roles 50% faster — here’s the breakdown with concrete numbers, pinned tools, and code you can ship today.

item.title: Max pool size missteps cripple apps
item.description: Cut p99 latency 60% with PostgreSQL connection pooling — the default 5–10 pool size and 30-second timeouts lose in 2026. Real benchmarks, Python 3.11 and asyncpg 0.29 examples.

item.title: Weaviate missed the real RAG bottleneck
item.description: Cut RAG latency 65% and AWS bill 32% by fixing prompt bloat, connection leaks, and cache TTL. Real numbers from a 7 k QPS Weaviate 1.22 pipeline.

item.title: Senior exodus: meetings vs code
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech not because of pay but because of scaling friction — connection leaks, unobserved errors, and flaky staging cost teams 40% of their velocity. Measure your own stack with pgBouncer 1.21, Prometheus 2.47, and Node.js 20 LTS.

item.title: Close the remote pay gap now
item.description: Increase remote salary 15–25% from a low-cost country in 2026 — Wise, Revolut, and the exact email template to anchor your ask and split FX risk.

item.title: Ship Africa: portfolio that hires you remotely
item.description: Portfolio projects that get remote hires in Africa: small tools, real impact, and metrics over flash. 2026 data and code examples included.

item.title: Skills that move the 2026 AI salary needle
item.description: PyTorch vs TensorFlow salaries 2026: $210k vs $180k gap — which skill actually moves your paycheck? Real benchmarks, hidden costs, and the framework that wins in production.

item.title: Senior exodus: hidden costs of scale
item.description: Cut senior engineer attrition 40% by fixing 4 hidden frictions — connection pools, retries, observability, and ownership tax. Concrete numbers and tooling from 2026.

item.title: Production RAG: what tutorials never mention
item.description: Cut RAG latency 92% and AWS bill 71% with semantic chunking, Qdrant 1.8.0, and Redis caching — the production lessons tutorials never mention.

item.title: Idle pools kill DB performance
item.description: Cut 95th percentile latency 60% by fixing connection pool settings — measure peak bursts, set idle timeout to 10s, and autoscale pools in 2026

item.title: Fine-tune or prompt: pick the right tool
item.description: Cut API costs 70% by switching from prompt engineering to fine-tuning at 10k prompts/day — latency drops from 380ms to 45ms, and accuracy often improves — plus when to stick with prompts

item.title: Pool size wrong? Your DB is bleeding
item.description: The conventional wisdom (and why it's incomplete) The most common advice about database connection pooling boils down to this: set the maximum pool size…

item.title: Pay them in US dollars, not pesos
item.description: Convert local salary to USD remotes with 3 concrete numbers — FX spreads, delays, and effective hourly rates. Includes a payment calculator, USD invoice generator, and negotiation scripts for LATAM developers.

item.title: Ship work, not code: Africa remote
item.description: Get hired remotely from Africa in 2026: show production artifacts (cost, latency, uptime) not just code. Live demos, post-incident reports, and canary graphs convert at 4.3x the rate of GitHub stars.

item.title: Senior engineers flee Big Tech—layers kill morale
item.description: Cut deployment friction 75% by fixing three connection mistakes every senior engineer hates — pgBouncer timeouts, Redis pipeline timeouts, SQLAlchemy stale connections.

item.title: 2026 salary: LLMs vs embeddings ROI
item.description: Cut inference costs 7.7x: LLMs vs embeddings salary ROI in 2026 — concrete benchmarks, cost data, and the exact stack that moved the needle at Plaid, Stripe, and Oscar Health.

item.title: AI pairs: how seniors win, juniors get filtered
item.description: Reduce API latency 38% and cut cloud costs 42% using AI pair programming — with real PostgreSQL 16 benchmarks and the connection-pool mistake most teams miss
